Title: 7 Proven Ways to Cut Your AWS Bill Without Touching Your Code | Intro: Cloud costs have a way of sneaking up on teams that are moving fast. Before you spin up another reserved instance, read this. | Outline: 1. Audit idle resources — what your console isn't telling you. 2. Right-size instances with CloudWatch data. 3. Spot and Savings Plans demystified. 4. S3 lifecycle policies that pay for themselves. 5. Data-transfer gotchas and how to avoid them. 6. FinOps culture: making cost everyone's job. 7. A 30-minute weekly review routine.

Title: What Six Months of Building in Public Taught Me About Failure | Intro: I shipped 12 tiny products last year. Eleven of them flopped publicly, and I've never learned faster. | Outline: 1. Why I started building in public. 2. The first flop and what stung the most. 3. The feedback loop no private builder gets. 4. How I rewired my relationship with failure. 5. The one project that stuck — and why. 6. Should you do it? An honest pros and cons.

Title: How We Reduced P95 API Latency by 68% in One Sprint | Intro: Speed is a feature. Here's the exact playbook our platform team used to reclaim it. | Outline: 1. Baseline: understanding where the time was going. 2. Database query profiling with EXPLAIN ANALYZE. 3. Strategic caching with Redis and cache-stampede prevention. 4. Connection pooling and HTTP keep-alive tuning. 5. Async offloading for non-critical paths. 6. Observability: the dashboards we now live by.

Hook: POV you just found out you've been using Excel wrong for 3 years 💀 | Script: No cap, pivot tables used to stress me out. But then I found this — highlight your data, hit Insert, Pivot Table, drag Revenue to Values, Category to Rows. Boom. Your boss thinks you worked all night. You did it in 4 minutes. Save this before your next report is due. | Caption: Excel hack that hits different 📊 #ExcelTips #WorkSmarter #OfficeHacks #TikTokCareer

Hook: Most developers don't know Python has a built-in profiler — and it's free. | Script: Run cProfile on any script with python -m cProfile -s cumulative your_script.py. You'll see every function, how many times it was called, and the total time it ate. Sort by cumulative to find your worst offenders instantly. Pair it with snakeviz for a visual flamegraph. Stop guessing why your code is slow — measure it. | Caption: Profile Python code in seconds with zero extra installs. #Python #Programming #CodeOptimization #DevTips

Hook: This is what a $1,200 hotel room looks like when it's done right. | Script: [B-roll: slow pan across floor-to-ceiling city view at golden hour] The Aman Tokyo doesn't compete on amenities — it competes on silence. [B-roll: close-up of handmade washi paper wall panels] Every surface is intentional. Every pause, designed. [B-roll: tea ceremony setup on hinoki wood table] This is what luxury looks like when it stops trying to impress you. | Caption: Some spaces don't just accommodate you — they change you. ✨ #LuxuryTravel #AmanTokyo #HotelReview #TravelReels
